steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Add the two equations to eliminate $x$: $(8x - 8x) + (7y - 5y) = 31 + 9$, giving $2y = 40$.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: $2y = 40$. The question asks for $2y$ directly, so no further steps are needed.

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: 40 is correct. The system is set up so adding the equations cancels $x$, leaving the requested expression $2y$ immediately rather than requiring the value of $y$ alone.
